Case# CWErr.cwUnsupportedCapabilitiesErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwUnsupportedCapabilitiesErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwunsupportedcapabilitieserr#Discussion)

Access point cannot support all requested capabilities.
